title: diastatea micrantha var. longibracteata
intro: Diastatea micrantha var. longibracteata, also known as Long-bracted Diastatea, is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae, characterized by its long bracts and small flowers. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Diastatea micrantha var. longibracteata include the relief of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. Diastatea micrantha var. longibracteata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, which are commonly consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
